Apply ALL of the following 4 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 8
Rule [family:MenuToggle]:
## MenuToggle Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <MenuToggle badge={...} icon={...} innerRef={...} isDisabled={...} isExpanded={...} isFullHeight={...} isFullWidth={...} isPlaceholder={...}>
    <MenuToggleAction id={...} isDisabled={...} onClick={...} />
  </MenuToggle>
```

Props that stay on <MenuToggle>: badge, icon, innerRef, isDisabled, isExpanded, isFullHeight, isFullWidth, isPlaceholder, isSettings, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, size, splitButtonItems, status, statusIcon, variant

Add imports: MenuToggleAction from '@patternfly/react-core'

Prop type changes:
  MenuToggleCheckbox.defaultChecked: boolean | null -> boolean

Incidents found in this file:
  Line 8: [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-menutoggle-menutoggle-menutoggleprops-d-ts-menutoggle-isplaceholder-signature-changed-group-5]

    spreadSource: true
    spreadType: MenuToggleProps
    typedSpread: true
    Fix strategy:
      Strategy: PropTypeChange

      To: property: isPlaceholder: boolean

Code contexts:

    8      <MenuToggle ref={toggleRef} {...props} variant="plain">
    9        <EllipsisVIcon />



Code context:
```
(no snippet)
```

### Fix 2
Line: 8
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: MenuToggle
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
    7    (
    8      <MenuToggle ref={toggleRef} {...props} variant="plain">
    9        <EllipsisVIcon />

```

### Fix 3
Line: 8
Rule [sd-prop-override-menutoggle-ouiaid-data-ouia-component-id]:
The <MenuToggle> component internally generates the `data-ouia-component-id` HTML attribute from the `ouiaId` prop via its internal helper. If you pass `data-ouia-component-id` as an HTML attribute, it will be silently overridden.

Use the `ouiaId` prop instead:

Before: <MenuToggle data-ouia-component-id="value" />
After:  <MenuToggle ouiaId="value" />

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  spreadSource: true
  spreadType: MenuToggleProps
  typedSpread: true

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
    7    (
    8      <MenuToggle ref={toggleRef} {...props} variant="plain">
    9        <EllipsisVIcon />

```

### Fix 4
Line: 8
Rule [sd-prop-override-menutoggle-ouiasafe-data-ouia-safe]:
The <MenuToggle> component internally generates the `data-ouia-safe` HTML attribute from the `ouiaSafe` prop via its internal helper. If you pass `data-ouia-safe` as an HTML attribute, it will be silently overridden.

Use the `ouiaSafe` prop instead:

Before: <MenuToggle data-ouia-safe="value" />
After:  <MenuToggle ouiaSafe="value" />

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  spreadSource: true
  spreadType: MenuToggleProps
  typedSpread: true

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
    7    (
    8      <MenuToggle ref={toggleRef} {...props} variant="plain">
    9        <EllipsisVIcon />

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/utils/components/toggles/KebabToggle.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: PropTypeChange for `isPlaceholder` and `splitButtonOptions`
This is about prop type changes on MenuToggle. The component uses `{...props}` with type `MenuToggleProps`. The spread passes through props like `isPlaceholder` and `splitButtonOptions`. Since these are type-level changes (the types of the props changed in v6), and the component just spreads props through, no code change is needed at the JSX level — the TypeScript types will be updated by the `@patternfly/react-core` package itself. The spread source is `MenuToggleProps` which will already have the updated types. No code change needed for this fix.

Wait, let me reconsider. The `splitButtonOptions` was renamed to `splitButtonItems` with a type change. But since this component just spreads `MenuToggleProps`, the type definition in v6 will already reflect the new prop name. The caller would need to change, not this component. No change needed here.

### Fix 2: Icon children to `icon` prop
The `<EllipsisVIcon />` is currently a child of `<MenuToggle>`. Since `variant="plain"` and it contains only an icon, I need to move the icon to the `icon` prop and make MenuToggle self-closing:
```
<MenuToggle ref={toggleRef} {...props} variant="plain" icon={<EllipsisVIcon />} />
```

### Fix 3: `data-ouia-component-id` → `ouiaId` prop
The spread `{...props}` could pass `data-ouia-component-id`. Since `props` is typed as `MenuToggleProps`, and this is about the spread potentially passing HTML attributes, this is a warning about the internal behavior. The component itself doesn't explicitly set `data-ouia-component-id`. Since it's a typed spread of `MenuToggleProps`, consumers should use `ouiaId` which is already part of `MenuToggleProps`. No code change needed in this file — it's informational about the spread behavior.

### Fix 4: `data-ouia-safe` → `ouiaSafe` prop
Same as Fix 3 — the spread `{...props}` could theoretically pass `data-ouia-safe`, but since it's typed as `MenuToggleProps`, the correct prop `ouiaSafe` is already available. No code change needed in this file.

The main actionable change is **Fix 2** — moving the icon from children to the `icon` prop.
Let me verify the final state:

The file looks correct. The icon has been moved from children to the `icon` prop, and the element is now self-closing.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `family:MenuToggle` (isPlaceholder type change, splitButtonOptions→splitButtonItems) | **No change needed** | The component spreads `MenuToggleProps` via `{...props}`. The type changes (`isPlaceholder` type narrowing, `splitButtonOptions`→`splitButtonItems` rename) are reflected in the v6 `MenuToggleProps` type definition itself. Callers of `KebabToggle` would need updating, not this file. No explicit usage of these props exists here. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle` | **Applied** | Moved `<EllipsisVIcon />` from children of `<MenuToggle>` to the `icon` prop: `icon={<EllipsisVIcon />}`. Made `<MenuToggle>` self-closing since it now has no children. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-prop-override-menutoggle-ouiaid-data-ouia-component-id` | **No change needed** | This is informational about `{...props}` spread behavior. The spread type is `MenuToggleProps` which already has `ouiaId` as the correct prop. No explicit `data-ouia-component-id` attribute is set in this file. Callers should use `ouiaId` on the `MenuToggleProps` they pass in. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-prop-override-menutoggle-ouiasafe-data-ouia-safe` | **No change needed** | Same as Fix 3 — informational about spread behavior. No explicit `data-ouia-safe` attribute is set. The typed spread already supports `ouiaSafe` via `MenuToggleProps`. |

The file looks correct. The icon has been moved from children to the `icon` prop, and the element is now self-closing.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `family:MenuToggle` (isPlaceholder type change, splitButtonOptions→splitButtonItems) | **No change needed** | The component spreads `MenuToggleProps` via `{...props}`. The type changes (`isPlaceholder` type narrowing, `splitButtonOptions`→`splitButtonItems` rename) are reflected in the v6 `MenuToggleProps` type definition itself. Callers of `KebabToggle` would need updating, not this file. No explicit usage of these props exists here. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle` | **Applied** | Moved `<EllipsisVIcon />` from children of `<MenuToggle>` to the `icon` prop: `icon={<EllipsisVIcon />}`. Made `<MenuToggle>` self-closing since it now has no children. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-prop-override-menutoggle-ouiaid-data-ouia-component-id` | **No change needed** | This is informational about `{...props}` spread behavior. The spread type is `MenuToggleProps` which already has `ouiaId` as the correct prop. No explicit `data-ouia-component-id` attribute is set in this file. Callers should use `ouiaId` on the `MenuToggleProps` they pass in. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-prop-override-menutoggle-ouiasafe-data-ouia-safe` | **No change needed** | Same as Fix 3 — informational about spread behavior. No explicit `data-ouia-safe` attribute is set. The typed spread already supports `ouiaSafe` via `MenuToggleProps`. |
